option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: { "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json", "compilerOptions": { "outDir": "./dist/out-tsc", "target": "ES2022", "module": "ES2022", "moduleResolution": "bundler", "lib": ["ES2022", "dom"], "strict": true, "esModuleInterop": true, "skipLibCheck": true, "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true, "experimentalDecorators": true, "useDefineForClassFields": false, "baseUrl": "./", "paths": { "@templateStorage/*": ["../../packages/*/src"], "@app/*": ["src/app/*"] } }, "angularCompilerOptions": { "enableI18nLegacyMessageIdFormat": false, "strictInjectionParameters": true, "strictInputAccessModifiers": true, "strictTemplates": true }, "include": ["src/**/*.ts"], "exclude": ["**/*.spec.ts", "node_modules", "dist"] }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json", "compilerOptions": { "outDir": "./dist/out-tsc", "target": "ES2022", "module": "ES2022", "moduleResolution": "bundler", "jsx": "react-jsx", "lib": ["ES2022", "dom"], "strict": true, "esModuleInterop": true, "skipLibCheck": true, "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true, "experimentalDecorators": true, "useDefineForClassFields": false, "baseUrl": "./", "paths": { "@templateStorage/ai-assistant-ui": ["../../packages/ai-assistant-ui/src/index.ts"], "@templateStorage/*": ["../../packages/*/src"], "@app/*": ["src/app/*"] } }, "angularCompilerOptions": { "enableI18nLegacyMessageIdFormat": false, "strictInjectionParameters": true, "strictInputAccessModifiers": true, "strictTemplates": true }, "include": ["src/**/*.ts", "src/**/*.tsx"], "exclude": ["**/*.spec.ts", "**/*.spec.tsx", "node_modules", "dist"] }

option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "name": "template-storage", "version": "0.0.1", "private": true, "workspaces": [ "apps/*", "packages/*" ], "scripts": { "dev:backend": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend", "dev:portal": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/portal", "build": "npm run build --workspaces --if-present", "test": "npm run test --workspaces --if-present", "lint": "eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx,.js,.cjs", "lint:fix": "eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx,.js,.cjs --fix", "format": "prettier --write .", "format:check": "prettier --check .", "docker:up": "docker compose up -d", "docker:down": "docker compose down", "prepare": "husky" }, "devDependencies": { "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^7.18.0", "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^7.18.0", "eslint": "^8.57.0", "eslint-config-prettier": "^9.1.0", "eslint-plugin-import": "^2.29.1", "husky": "^9.1.7", "lint-staged": "^15.2.10", "prettier": "^3.2.5", "typescript": "~5.9.0" }, "lint-staged": { "*.{ts,tsx,js,cjs}": [ "eslint --fix", "prettier --write" ], "*.{json,md,yaml,yml}": [ "prettier --write" ] }, "engines": { "node": ">=20.0.0", "npm": ">=10.0.0" } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "name": "template-storage", "version": "0.0.1", "private": true, "workspaces": [ "apps/backend", "apps/frontend", "packages/i18n", "packages/shared-types", "packages/test-utils", "packages/ai-assistant-ui" ], "scripts": { "dev:backend": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend", "dev:portal": "npm run dev --workspace=apps/portal", "build": "npm run build --workspaces --if-present", "test": "npm run test --workspaces --if-present", "lint": "eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx,.js,.cjs", "lint:fix": "eslint . --ext .ts,.tsx,.js,.cjs --fix", "format": "prettier --write .", "format:check": "prettier --check .", "docker:up": "docker compose up -d", "docker:down": "docker compose down", "prepare": "husky" }, "devDependencies": { "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^7.18.0", "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^7.18.0", "eslint": "^8.57.0", "eslint-config-prettier": "^9.1.0", "eslint-plugin-import": "^2.29.1", "husky": "^9.1.7", "lint-staged": "^15.2.10", "prettier": "^3.2.5", "typescript": "~5.9.0" }, "lint-staged": { "*.{ts,tsx,js,cjs}": [ "eslint --fix", "prettier --write" ], "*.{json,md,yaml,yml}": [ "prettier --write" ] }, "engines": { "node": ">=20.0.0", "npm": ">=10.0.0" } }

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# @templateStorage/ai-assistant-ui
Переиспользуемый UI-модуль AI-ассистента для React + MUI.
## Что внутри
- controlled-компонент `AiAssistant` - reducer и action-типизация для родительского приложения - расширяемый формат сообщений (`status`, `meta`, `attachments`) - Storybook-сценарии состояний
## Скрипты
```bash npm run test --workspace=packages/ai-assistant-ui npm run build --workspace=packages/ai-assistant-ui npm run storybook --workspace=packages/ai-assistant-ui ```

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: { "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json", "compilerOptions": { "module": "ESNext", "moduleResolution": "bundler", "target": "ES2022", "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM"], "jsx": "react-jsx", "outDir": "dist", "rootDir": "src" }, "include": ["src"], "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "**/*.spec.ts", "**/*.spec.tsx"] }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json", "compilerOptions": { "module": "ESNext", "moduleResolution": "bundler", "target": "ES2022", "lib": ["ES2022", "DOM"], "jsx": "react-jsx", "outDir": "dist", "rootDir": "src" }, "include": ["src"], "exclude": [ "node_modules", "dist", "**/*.spec.ts", "**/*.spec.tsx", "**/*.stories.tsx" ] }
